task_completion.description: Verify that a new item of type 'Computer Program' was created in Juris-M.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Juris-M right-hand details pane, the 'Item Type' field should display 'Computer Program'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Title field is correctly filled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Title' field in the details pane contains exactly 'R: A Language and Environment for Statistical Computing'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Programmer field is correctly filled as an organization.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Programmer' field contains 'R Core Team'. It should be in single-field mode (indicating an organization/institution) rather than split into two boxes for first and last names.

task_completion.description: Verify the Version and Date fields are correctly filled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Version' field contains '4.3.0' and the 'Date' field contains '2023'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Company and Place fields are correctly filled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Company' field contains 'R Foundation for Statistical Computing' and the 'Place' field contains 'Vienna, Austria'.

task_completion.description: Verify the URL field is correctly filled.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Juris-M graphical user interface to add the reference.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Juris-M application window and its metadata entry fields, not a terminal, script editor, or direct database modification tool.

integrity.description: Verify the agent entered the data into the specific designated fields rather than dumping all text into a single generic field.
integrity.visual_evidence: The metadata must be distributed across the correct individual fields (Title, Programmer, Version, Company, Place, Date, URL) in the right pane, rather than pasted entirely into 'Extra', 'Abstract', or a Note.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually interacted with the application to input the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show intermediate steps of data entry, such as dropdown menus for item types being opened, or text being actively typed into the Juris-M fields.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct metadata for the Juris-M 'Computer Program' entry is: Title: 'R: A Language and Environment for Statistical Computing'; Programmer: 'R Core Team' (must be entered as a single-field organization, not split into first/last name); Version: '4.3.0'; Company: 'R Foundation for Statistical Computing'; Place: 'Vienna, Austria'; Date: '2023'; URL: 'https://www.R-project.org/'.
